risinfo.chaptertitle: Appendix II. Test Your Knowledge! Answer Key

listitem.para: a. True. Telemedicine codes 98000–98015 may be selected according to either level of MDM or total time on the date of the encounter.
a. Codes 98000–98007 do not require a specific time interval from the last in-person or telemedicine visit. Codes 98004–98007 are reported for established patient synchronous audio-video visits.
c. Code 98012 is supported by greater than 10 minutes of medical discussion in combination with total time exceeding 10 minutes.

b. Report 99417 (prolonged outpatient E/M service) appended with modifier 95 × 1 unit for 20 minutes of prolonged service. Report unit of 99417 95 for each full 15-minute period beyond the total time of the primary service (ie, 98003 or 98007 selected on the basis of total time).
b. Code 98016 is reported for a service that is initiated by the established patient and/or parent or caregiver and that includes at least 5 and up to 10 minutes of medical discussion.
